---

**Is your feature related to a problem?**
A clear description of what's missing.

**Describe the solution**
What you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives**
Other options you've considered.

**Which world does this belong to?**
- [ ] 🧪 Scientific
- [ ] 🎨 Artistic
- [ ] 📜 Historical
- [ ] 🌍 Geographical
- [ ] 🏛️ Architectural
- [ ] ☀️ Religious
- [ ] 🇪🇬 National
- [ ] 📦 Logistical
- [ ] 🚀 Space & Rockets
- [ ] 🌌 Core/General

**Additional context**
Screenshots, mockups, references.
